summary: Made two surgical seam edits: added a spatial bridge at the opening to connect from chapter 11's upstairs handoff, and added a brief closing aftermath beat so the forged funding-letter upload clearly opens into the longer fallout week referenced in chapter 13. Core beats, causality, and dialogue registers were left intact.
edits: Added an 'Upstairs' anchor to the opening sentence to tighten entry continuity with chapter 11's final sixth-floor office image.
Extended the last paragraph with a short line indicating the 4:30 p.m. paperwork crisis is solved but the week-long aftermath is just beginning.
Verified the local style bible does not contain any example_lines entries, so no calibration-line replacements were required.
